nodes.label: AI as practical problem-solving tool
nodes.grounding_span: it has been really useful for identifying plants for customers

nodes.label: AI for reasoning and calculations
nodes.label_negative: AI for writing and emotional tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I like having advanced reasoning in my pocket

nodes.label: AI as efficiency booster for management
nodes.label_negative: Management resistance to AI due to hubris
nodes.grounding_span: they'd save so much time if they added essentially another manager to delegate

nodes.label: AI as complement to holistic thinking
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to traditional skills
nodes.grounding_span: AI is most effectively used by holistic thinkers

nodes.label: AI for impersonal tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for personal and emotional tasks
nodes.grounding_span: tasks that involve emotion or passion... I do myself

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and authenticity
nodes.grounding_span: texting family, or writing for fun, I do myself

nodes.label: Intellectual growth and exploration
nodes.grounding_span: I like to use it to engage in Socratic questioning

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for practical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: it was genuinely satisfying and felt like a 'we're living in the future' moment

nodes.label: Frustration with management's lack of AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: they don't know what they're missing

nodes.label: Optimism about AI empowering neurodivergent thinkers
nodes.grounding_span: AI will usher in an age for people with brains like mine

nodes.label: Resistance to AI in personal emotional tasks
nodes.grounding_span: the idea of having AI text on behalf of me to a family member is very weird

nodes.label: Experimental and iterative approach
nodes.grounding_span: I'd love to just experiment with it and see what things could be sped up
